metadata.title: Strangelove (Highjack Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[02:06.81] Strangelove, strange highs and strange lows
[02:10.94] Strangelove, that's how my love goes
[02:15.16] Strangelove, will you give it to me?
[02:19.33] Will you take the pain I will give to you
[02:23.52] Again and again, will you return it?
[02:27.70] 
[03:13.73] There'll be times when my crimes
[03:18.02] Will seem almost unforgivable
[03:21.68] I give in to sin
[03:25.82] Because you have to make this life liveable
[03:29.74] But when you think I've had enough from your sea of love
[03:34.23] I'll take more than another riverfull
[03:38.18] Yes, and I'll make it all worthwhile
[03:44.66] I'll make your heart smile
[03:46.70] Strangelove, strange highs and strange lows
[03:50.94] Strangelove, that's how my love goes
[03:54.90] Strangelove, will you give it to me?
[03:59.07] Will you take the pain I will give to you
[04:03.58] Again and again, will you return it?
[04:13.19] There'll be days when I'll stray
[04:17.31] I may appear to be constantly out of reach
[04:21.23] I give in to sin
[04:25.47] Because I like to practice what I preach
[04:29.37] I'm not trying to say I'll have it all my way
[04:33.57] I'm always willing to learn when you've got something to teach
[04:37.71] Oh, and I'll make it all worthwhile
[04:44.44] I'll make your heart smile
[04:46.33] Pain, will you return it?
[04:49.17] I'll say it again, pain
[04:54.31] Pain, will you return it?
[04:57.26] I'll say it again, pain
[05:02.49] Pain, will you return it?
[05:05.33] I'll say it again, pain
[05:10.60] Pain, will you return it?
[05:12.95] I won't say it again
[05:26.87] Strangelove
[05:34.72] Strangelove
[05:42.78] Strangelove
[05:51.17] Strangelove
[05:55.09] Strangelove, strange highs and strange lows
[05:59.11] Strangelove, that's how my love goes
[06:03.80]
